resources.string: ChsBuffer\'s LSPosed module, powered by Morphe, ReVanced, and beyond.
Force stop the corresponding application to apply the settings.
You must also disable \"Force apps to show launcher icons\" in LSPosed Manager.
Activate this module in Module Management!
ChsBuffer\'s LSPosed module, powered by Morphe, ReVanced, and beyond.\n\nThis is not an official Morphe or ReVanced project, do not ask their developers for help.
